title: prangos ferulacea subsp. carinata
intro: Prangos ferulacea subsp. carinata, also known as Ferula carinata, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and native to the Middle East and Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ferula carinata include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Ferula carinata is often used in the form of essential oils, infusions, or tinctures, and is believed to have a stimulating effect on the body's immune system.
